parameters.query:
SELECT
  id,
  name,
  airport,
  COALESCE(origin, 'POA') AS origin,
  flight_date::text AS flight_date,
  city
FROM n8n_eventos
WHERE active = true
  AND flight_date >= CURRENT_DATE
  AND flight_date <= CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '60 days'
  AND airport IS NOT NULL
  AND airport != COALESCE(origin, 'POA')
ORDER BY flight_date ASC;

WITH inserted AS (
  INSERT INTO n8n_monitoramento
    (evento_id, checked_at, price, airline, dep_time, arr_time, stops, triggered)
  VALUES (
    '{{ $json.evento_id }}',
    NOW(),
    {{ $json.price }},
    '{{ $json.airline }}',
    '{{ $json.dep_time }}',
    '{{ $json.arr_time }}',
    {{ $json.stops }},
    false
  )
  RETURNING *
),
last_check AS (
  SELECT price AS last_price
  FROM n8n_monitoramento
  WHERE evento_id = '{{ $json.evento_id }}'
    AND id < (SELECT id FROM inserted)
  ORDER BY checked_at DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
  i.price            AS current_price,
  l.last_price,
  i.evento_id,
  '{{ $json.evento_name }}' AS evento_name,
  '{{ $json.airline }}'    AS airline,
  '{{ $json.dep_time }}'   AS dep_time,
  '{{ $json.arr_time }}'   AS arr_time,
  {{ $json.stops }}        AS stops,
  '{{ $json.origin }}'     AS origin,
  '{{ $json.dest }}'       AS dest,
  '{{ $json.flight_date }}' AS flight_date
FROM inserted i
JOIN last_check l ON i.price < l.last_price;
